page: Microsoft Azure E96-24ads_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 24 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs mapped to 12 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor, operating at a clock speed of 4.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 768.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 32 GB per vCPU. Additionally, it includes 5669 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, though it does not feature any GPU accelerators.

In benchmark evaluations, the server demonstrates top-tier single-core performance, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance, single-threaded gzip compression, and single-threaded bzip3 decompression all placing in the top 10% of tested systems. Multi-core performance, including stress-ng multi-core and PassMark CPU scores, falls within the average range. Memory performance is strong, with the PassMark memory score ranking in the top 25%, while large-block memory read and write bandwidths remain in the middle tier. For lightweight machine learning tasks, the server achieves top-tier text generation speeds on small 135M models, though performance scales down to average levels for medium 7B models.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E96-24ads_v7 offers a high density of memory and local storage relative to its vCPU count, making it a viable option for workloads that are memory-bound rather than compute-bound. The combination of 768 GB of RAM and over 5.6 TB of local storage makes this server well-suited for large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems like Redis, data warehousing, and memory-intensive enterprise applications.
description: Microsoft Azure E96-24ads_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine powered by a 4.5 GHz AMD EPYC 9V45 processor with 24 dedicated vCPUs and 12 physical cores. It features an exceptionally high memory capacity of 768.0 GB alongside 5669 GB of local storage, with no GPU acceleration. Benchmarks highlight top-tier single-core CPU performance and strong memory performance, while multi-core compute and database operations align with average tiers. This configuration is highly efficient for memory-intensive workloads that do not require massive parallel CPU scaling. It is best suited for large in-memory databases, caching layers, and data warehousing applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E96-24ads_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 24 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 768 GB of RAM, and 5669 GB of local storage, designed for memory-intensive database workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E96-24ads_v7 features 24 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 768 GB RAM, and 5669 GB local storage, optimized for memory-heavy database workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized virtual machine featuring extensive local storage and strong single-core performance for demanding database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a 4.5 GHz AMD EPYC 9V45 processor with 24 dedicated vCPUs.
Equipped with 768 GB of RAM, offering 32 GB of memory per vCPU.
Includes 5669 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage.
Delivers top-tier single-core CPU and single-threaded decompression performance.
Optimized for large in-memory databases, caching, and data warehousing.
